subscription expires. They already learned, this service costs nothing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

Add keyword search and arrow navigation to OAuth project selection (#693)

## Summary
<!-- Provide a brief description of the changes in this PR -->
dbt Platform accounts can have A LOT of projects (envs too but not as
many). In these cases with OAuth, you have to manually scroll through
_many_ projects to get to the one you want. This can get annoying for
folks that have more than 10-20 projects (for reference an internal
sandbox account I was working with has 40+ projects to scroll through).

This PR allows for two things to alleviate the above issue:
- Keyword search
- Using up/down arrows to select and navigate the options

## Checklist
- [x] I have performed a self-review of my code
- [ ] I have made corresponding changes to the documentation (in
https://github.com/dbt-labs/docs.getdbt.com) if required -- Mention it
here
- [ ] I have added tests that prove my fix is effective or that my
feature works
- [ ] New and existing unit tests pass locally with my changes

## Validation
Ran `task run` with env vars configured for OAuth flow and followed by
manual tests of UI. Code reviewed locally via Claude. I have a screen
recording that I can share as well. Feel free to try it out yourself on
this branch!

PR aided with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

---------

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: job timeout loop — pipeline berhenti sebelum diproses

Bug: TIMEOUT_DEFAULT=60s < polling interval 5 menit, job langsung expired
     sebelum agent sempat menjemput. requeueJob() tidak mereset timeout_at,
     sehingga job yang di-requeue juga langsung expired → loop sampai dead-letter.

- TIMEOUT_DEFAULT: 60000 → 1800000 (30 menit)
- requeueJob(): tambah param timeoutMs, reset timeout_at ke waktu baru
- _handleRetryOrDead(): pass config.timeouts.default ke requeueJob

commit.message:
Phase 8: NEXUS Idea Bank — collect, vote, prioritize ideas

Ideas come from 3 sources: Briefs (auto-extracted), Admin (manual),
and virtual Employees (from research). All stored in nexus_ideas table
with voting, CEO recommendation, comments, and status tracking.

DB:
- nexus_ideas: 30 fields including voting (score, upvotes, downvotes,
  votedBy), CEO recommendation, source tracking, priority, status
- nexus_idea_comments: discussion thread per idea

Backend:
- nexusIdeaExtractor.ts: AI extracts up to 15 structured ideas from
  brief department outputs. Also extracts from employee research.
- 9 API endpoints: CRUD + vote + comment + defer + extract-ideas

Frontend:
- AdminNexusIdeaBank.tsx: Full idea management page with:
  - Stats header (total, approved, in sprint, deferred)
  - Filter bar by status/priority/category
  - Idea cards with vote buttons, priority badges, source labels
  - Detail modal: CEO recommendation, status actions, comments
  - Create modal for manual ideas
- Route: /admin/nexus/ideas

so VimTestBridge can read vim state without accessing internal VimState,

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

Initial commit: 2D diffusion model from scratch

Implements a Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Model (DDPM) on 2D toy data
(Swiss roll) with extensive physics commentary connecting to:
- Ornstein-Uhlenbeck process / Langevin dynamics
- Score functions and reverse-time diffusion
- Denoising score matching

Includes:
- Forward diffusion process with linear noise schedule
- MLP noise predictor with sinusoidal time embeddings
- Training loop with progress visualization
- DDPM and accelerated sampling
- Visualizations of forward/reverse processes

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

fix: bottom scroll jank - remove flex layout from body (Medium pattern)

Root cause: min-h-screen + flex + flex-1 caused browser to
recalculate flex layout when scroll first reached bottom,
changing scrollbar size and causing page jank.

- body: remove min-h-screen, flex, flex-col
- body: add position: relative (Medium pattern)
- content div: remove flex-1
- Footer: remove mt-12 (main padding handles spacing)
- Simple block layout: Header → Content → Footer, natural flow

commit.message:
feat: add llama zodiac constellation canvas with interactive easter eggs

Replace the simple particle background with a rich animated canvas featuring
12 llama zodiac constellations (lamaries, lamaurus, lamini, etc.), each with
element-colored glows (fire/earth/air/water) and characteristic thoughts.

Star physics:
- 3D spring-back wander inside spheres with perspective projection
- Distance-to-home glow (closer = brighter, cubic falloff)
- Glow-driven scale (brighter constellations appear larger)
- Capped 3D rotation (pitch/yaw) with bounce impulses on direction changes

Constellation movement:
- DVD-bounce linear paths with wall reflection
- Smooth collision avoidance curves (smoothstep eased heading changes)
- Responsive scaling bound to screen width (smaller on mobile)

Interactive layers:
- Hover: stars pull home, rotation flattens, movement pauses, label + thought fade in
- Double-click/double-tap: all constellations gather in a circle (two-ring layout
  when near edges), distance-optimized slot assignment, physics-based formation
- Wink: random constellation pulses every 5-10s as a subtle hover hint
- Touch support with double-tap detection, scroll/tap dismiss for gathering

commit.message:
fix: write barrier/bulk acks directly under writeMu, not via barrierCh

The barrierCh priority channel doesn't help when sendLoop is blocked
on writeMu (held by BulkSync per-session writes). The ack sits in
barrierCh while sendLoop can't read it. Write acks directly under
writeMu instead — they'll be sent as soon as the current BulkSync
per-session write releases the lock (<1ms).

commit.message:
CC reconciliation: line-by-line matching with editable amounts

When CC total doesn't match bank payment amount:
1. User picks bank line → if amounts match, auto-reconcile
2. If amounts differ → ReconciliationDetail screen opens
3. All CC lines shown with checkboxes + editable amount fields
4. Real-time total of checked lines vs bank payment amount
5. User unchecks/modifies lines until amounts balance (±1 CHF)
6. "Valider" button links checked lines, marks unchecked as pending

Backend:
- POST /api/import/batches/{id}/reconcile-detail accepts included
  (with optional amount overrides) and excluded transaction lists
- credit_card_pending type added to all HIDDEN_TYPES filters
- reconcile-manual now returns need_detail when amounts differ

Frontend:
- ReconciliationDetail: checkbox table, inline amount editing,
  live difference indicator, validate button
- ReconciliationPicker: auto-opens detail when amounts don't match

commit.message:
Research quality overhaul: 6 fixes for source reliability

Audit found 59% low-trust + 20% very-low-trust sources, duplicates,
off-topic Reddit, and zero source citations in department outputs.

Fix 1 — Trust minimum threshold:
  Reddit: skip posts with trust < 15 or score < 3
  GitHub: skip repos with < 5 stars
  directDeptResearch: filter sources < 15 trust before returning

Fix 2 — Relevance filtering:
  Reddit: posts must match at least 2 query terms in title+text
  Fetches 8 candidates but returns max 5 (after filtering)

Fix 3 — Cross-department dedup:
  After all depts complete, remove duplicate URLs across departments
  Keeps first occurrence (highest-trust dept gets the source)

Fix 4 — Citation instructions in system prompts:
  Added mandatory citation rules to buildAgentPrompt():
  - Must cite sources with [name](URL) or "professional judgment"
  - Skip sources with trust < 40
  - Ignore sources irrelevant to MemorAid/healthcare
  - Must include "Known Unknowns" section
  Added quality tier indicators (🟢🟡🔴) to source table
  Added low-trust warning when most sources are weak

Fix 5 — MemorAid context in Perplexity prompts:
  Added MEMORAID_CONTEXT constant with project description
  Appended to every Perplexity search query for relevance

Fix 6 — Quality tiers in prompt envelope:
  Sources filtered to trust >= 20 before display
  Visual quality indicators (🟢 70+, 🟡 40-69, 🔴 20-39)

Expected: 0 sources with trust < 15, < 5% off-topic, citation in all outputs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

New API endpoints:

All endpoints ready for external system connection via Bearer token.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

feat(runtime): auto-install missing npm packages for SSR/API routes (#2093) (#2238)

* feat(runtime): auto-install missing npm packages for SSR/API routes (#2093)

Extract auto-install coordination into shared AutoInstaller struct and
thread it into PersistentIsolate. When SSR or API route modules import a
missing package, the isolate now detects "Cannot find module" errors,
installs the package via pm::add, creates a fresh V8 runtime, and retries
(up to 5 times). This mirrors the existing browser-side auto-install
behavior for /@deps/ requests.

- New auto_installer.rs: dedup, blacklist, global lock, broadcaster
- Refactored DevServerState to use Option<Arc<AutoInstaller>>
- Removed standalone auto_install_package() (~160 lines)
- Added retry loop in isolate_event_loop with fresh runtime per retry
- parse_missing_package() helper with 6 unit tests
- Shared Arc<AutoInstaller> coordinates both browser and V8 paths

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* refactor(runtime): address review findings for auto-install (#2093)

- Extract shared MISSING_MODULE_PREFIX/SUFFIX constants between
  module_loader.rs and parse_missing_package() to prevent format drift
- Extract try_auto_install() helper to DRY the 3 identical retry blocks
- Add log when already-installed package is skipped (debugging aid)
- Add tests: shared constant integration, try_auto_install edge cases

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

* fix(runtime): correct SSR fallback detection placement after rebase (#2093)

The SSR fallback detection logic (framework vs plain JS app) was
placed in the extract_api_handler error handler during conflict
resolution. Moved it to the correct location: the SSR init module
loading error handler where @vertz/ui-server/ssr fails to load.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

boot since the script was committed without +x. This caused the trading
instance to run stale code, missing all commits pushed between reboots.

the "-" sentinel pattern from the From/Into impls.
